creator: martti.kuparinen@ericsson.com
text:
The current sysinstall does not have Finnish keyboard settings. The Finnish
and Swedish keyboards are, however, identical. But as some (or most?)
users are unaware of this, I have created the appropriate keyboard maps and
settings needed in sysinstall. I think this should be in 3.1-RELEASE...

Fix: Apply the following patch file (it's gzipped and uuencoded). It will
create the Finnish keyboard maps in /usr/src/share/syscons and add
support for these in /usr/src/release/sysinstall.
